---
id: find-entity
title: "Find an entity by its name."
description: "If `root` entity is specified, it will search recursively from that entity's children."
sidebar_label: "Find an entity by its name."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/homunculus-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Find an entity by its name."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/entities"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



If `root` entity is specified, it will search recursively from that entity's children.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
